payload.answer: Acknowledged. I will treat the directive as a general memory goal about AI, maintain ambiguity where appropriate, and avoid collapsing competing interpretations into a single definitive fact.

entity_resolution.reason: The directive is broad and nonspecific; no discrete entities identifiable beyond the general topic of AI.

details: Directive received: Remember everything about AI.
No conflicting data detected in this input.

repair_options: Clarify scope: specify subtopics within AI to memorize (e.g., definitions, architectures, ethics).
Define memory retention rules (durable vs. transient) for AI-related facts.
Establish update protocol for new AI knowledge to prevent overriding prior ambiguous entries.
